title: Fix discord_user threading in congress trigger

log.context: Fix discord_user threading in congress trigger

Both pushed. Here's a summary of the findings and what was done:

---

**Root cause**

The bug was in three places forming a chain:

1. `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/workflows/congress_wf.py` — the workflow correctly extracted `discord_user` from its input dict, but then called `congress_start` passing only the plain `topic` string, discarding `discord_user`.

2. `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/congress_act.py` — `congress_start` only accepted `topic: str` and only sent `{"topic": topic...(truncated)
